use actix_web::{web, App, HttpServer, HttpResponse};

async fn compute_handler(path: web::Path<u64>) -> HttpResponse {
    let id = path.into_inner();
    // BAD: blocking pool for trivial arithmetic
    let result = web::block(move || {
        id * 2 + 1
    })
    .await
    .unwrap();

    HttpResponse::Ok().body(result.to_string())
}

async fn hash_handler(input: String) -> HttpResponse {
    // BAD: blocking pool for tiny hash
    let hash = web::block(move || {
        let mut h: u64 = 0;
        for b in input.bytes() {
            h = h.wrapping_mul(31).wrapping_add(b as u64);
        }
        h
    })
    .await
    .unwrap();

    HttpResponse::Ok().body(hash.to_string())
}
